advantages.title: Our advantages
advantages.description: Discover what sets Jackson & Frank apart in global workforce solutions. With decades of experience, comprehensive services, and unwavering commitment to excellence, we deliver unmatched value to businesses worldwide.

items.title: Extensive industry experience
points: 50+ years in HR with offices in 15+ countries.
Partnerships across 160+ countries.
Specialized in European labor laws with 19+ years of tax and compliance expertise.

items.title: One-stop HR solutions
points: End-to-end services: immigration, onboarding, payroll, offboarding.
Tailored strategies for unique business needs.
Relocation support: housing, schools, language services.

items.title: Expert multidisciplinary team support
points: Skilled tax, compliance, audit, and accounting professionals.
High-touch services delivered by real experts no reliance on SaaS only tools.

items.title: Commitment to compliance and security
points: Fully licensed and GDPR-compliant across locations.
Employee leasing authorization (e.g., NEN, AÜG).
Strong data security backed by 19+ years of regulatory expertise.

items.title: Local support & agile solutions
points: Fast, responsive communication.
24/7 dedicated team with local expert support.
Customized solutions based on the clients' business cases.

items.title: AÜG-license
items.iconAlt: AÜG License - German Federal Employment Agency
points: Compliance with German labor leasing laws, minimizing risks of fines or legal challenges.
Legally hire temporary staff or outsourced employees without establishing a local entity.
Quicker onboarding for temporary workforce

items.title: NeN 4400-1 Certified
points: Ensures compliance with payroll tax and employee administration requirements
Builds trust with clients and partners by verifying adherence to high industry standards.
Prevents issues like wage theft and unverified contracts, ensuring transparent operations.

items.title: GDPR Compliance
points: Protects personal and sensitive data, preventing breaches and ensuring privacy.
Meets European data privacy laws, avoiding penalties and fines.
Builds client and employee trust by prioritizing secure and ethical data handling

faqs.title: Frequently asked questions
faqs.subtitle: Common questions about our advantages and capabilities

items.question: What experience does Jackson & Frank have in global HR?
items.answer: We have 50+ years of combined HR expertise, with offices in 15+ countries and partnerships across 160+ countries. We specialize in European labor laws and have 19+ years of tax and compliance experience.

items.question: Do you offer end-to-end HR solutions?
items.answer: Yes. We provide immigration, onboarding, payroll, offboarding, and relocation support including housing, schools, and language services so you have one partner for your global workforce needs.

items.question: How do you ensure compliance and security?
items.answer: We are fully licensed and GDPR-compliant where we operate, hold employee leasing authorizations (e.g. NEN, AÜG), and maintain strong data security backed by 19+ years of regulatory expertise.

items.question: What kind of support can I expect?
items.answer: We offer 24/7 dedicated team support with local experts, fast and responsive communication, and solutions tailored to your business case no SaaS only approach; you work with real experts.

items.question: Do you offer relocation and settling-in support?
items.answer: Yes. We help with housing, schools, language services, and settling-in so employees and their families can transition smoothly. This is part of our end-to-end mobility and onboarding support.

items.question: How do you compare on pricing?
items.answer: Our pricing is transparent and competitive. We provide custom quotes based on countries, headcount, and services. Using us typically saves €110K–200K per country versus setting up your own entity.

items.question: Can you integrate with our existing HR or payroll systems?
items.answer: Yes. We offer integrations and APIs where needed. Our team can work with your existing HRIS, accounting, and time-tracking tools to keep data in sync and workflows smooth.

items.question: What if we need to scale quickly?
items.answer: We're built for scale. You can add employees and countries without entity setup delays. Our 48–72 hour onboarding in most markets lets you respond quickly to business needs.
